description: Upload a single file as an attachment to an existing LabArchives entry via a multipart POST. DESTRUCTIVE: it writes a file into the live electronic lab notebook.
rules: DESTRUCTIVE — attaches a file to an entry on the live remote notebook
credentials are read from LA_CONFIG (a config.yaml)
LA_NBID + LA_ENTRY_ID select the target; LA_FILE is the local file to upload
needs the requests package + network; degrades to {} offline
usage: Set LA_CONFIG, LA_NBID, LA_ENTRY_ID, LA_FILE. Output: upload_attachment.json audit.
limitation: Requires the requests package (and labarchives-py for auth), valid credentials, and network. Supported file types include PDF/DOCX/TXT, PNG/JPG/TIFF, CSV/XLSX/HDF5, CIF/MOL/PDB, ZIP/7Z. Offline the tool writes {} and exits 0.
